title: Tier 0 — Maternelle
prompt:
You are taking a TIER 0 technical evaluation — the simplest level.

Solve 5 basic JavaScript exercises (no TypeScript, no frameworks). Write each requested function.

Return your answers in Markdown using headers for the exercise IDs and code blocks for the JavaScript functions.

[EXERCISE 0-A: Return text]
Write a JavaScript function "direBonjour()" that takes no parameters and returns the string "Bonjour".

[EXERCISE 0-B: Return boolean]
Write a JavaScript function "retournerVrai()" that takes no parameters and returns the boolean true.

[EXERCISE 0-C: Return number]
Write a JavaScript function "retourner42()" that takes no parameters and returns the number 42.

[EXERCISE 0-D: Addition]
Write a JavaScript function "additionner(a, b)" that takes two numbers and returns their sum.

[EXERCISE 0-E: Identity function]
Write a JavaScript function "identite(x)" that takes one parameter and returns it exactly as it is.

Expected Markdown format:
### tache_X
```javascript
function solution() { ... }
```

[ALGORITHMIC EXERCISES — code pur, sans culture générale]
Return each function using a Markdown header (### <exercise id>) followed by a ```javascript code block.

[EXERCISE algo_facile_1]
Write a JavaScript function "estPair(n)" that returns true if n is even, false otherwise.

[EXERCISE algo_facile_2]
Write a JavaScript function "carre(n)" that returns n multiplied by itself.

[EXERCISE algo_moyen_1]
Write a JavaScript function "somme1aN(n)" that returns the sum of all integers from 1 to n (n >= 1).

[EXERCISE algo_difficile_1]
Write a JavaScript function "inverserChaine(s)" that returns the string reversed (e.g. "abc" -> "cba").

[EXERCISE algo_defi]
Write a JavaScript function "valeurMax(tab)" that returns the largest number in a non-empty array.

tasks.label: Algorithmique — Parité
tasks.hint: Un nombre est pair si le reste de sa division par 2 vaut 0 : n % 2 === 0.

tasks.label: Algorithmique — Carré
tasks.hint: Le carré d'un nombre est le nombre multiplié par lui-même : n * n.

tasks.label: Algorithmique — Somme 1..N
tasks.hint: Boucle de 1 à n en accumulant, ou formule n * (n + 1) / 2.

tasks.label: Algorithmique — Inversion de chaîne
tasks.hint: s.split("").reverse().join("") inverse les caractères d'une chaîne.

tasks.label: Algorithmique — Maximum d'un tableau
tasks.hint: Parcourez en gardant la plus grande valeur, ou Math.max(...tab).
